## Layer(s) Affected

- [ ] L1 - OS Foundation (Infrastructure Integrity)

- [ ] L7 - Human Governance

## Security Considerations

<!-- 
ZoD is a security framework. Every change has security implications.
- Does this change affect a trust boundary?
- Could this introduce a bypass path?
- Does this weaken any existing control?
- If unsure, say so — reviewers will help evaluate.
